headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on JB Hunt Transport Servs, Raises Price Target to $326
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Bascome Majors   maintains JB Hunt Transport Servs (NASDAQ:JBHT) with a Positive and raises the price target from $290 to $326.

headline: Ryder Systems: Growth Is Beginning To Stall (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Ryder Systems (R) downgraded to Hold as revenue growth stalls and margins slip vs XPO/JBHT/ARCB.
